calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses Re Defendant John Putneys Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents (Set 1); And, Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-17-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Oleg Albert, Esq. 415-446-6799 Le Clerc & Le Clerc for Plaintiff.
Miles Woodlief, Esq. 415-730-3032 for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. Mr. ALbert does not contest the TR; the motions were filed timely; narrowly tailored; TR on point. Mr. Woodlief presents arguments; meet and confer went properly, states timeline of events, sanctions not appropriate, amended sets of discovery provided.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

1 - Plaintiff Anastasiia Lisinetckaia's Motion To Compel Further Responses Re Defendant John Putney's Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents (Set 1) And Request For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

The Court signs six orders for the six discovery motions.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
